item.title: FBI releases images of masked person in hunt for Savannah Guthrie's mother
item.description: The mother of the news anchor Savannah disappeared in the middle of night from her Tucson, Arizona, home and was last seen on 31 January.

item.title: Ex-police chief said Trump told him in 2006 'everyone' knew of Epstein's behaviour
item.description: The now-president allegedly called police in Florida who were investigating Epstein and said "thank goodness you're stopping him".

item.title: Bid launched to extend Zimbabwe president's term in office
item.description: President Mnangagwa's term in office is due to end in 2028 but a bill could open the way for him to extend that time.

item.title: Under-fire Trump commerce secretary confirms he visited Epstein's island
item.description: Howard Lutnick says he had lunch on the island in 2012, contradicting previous claims he had cut ties with Jeffrey Epstein in 2005.

item.title: Trump threatens to block opening of US-Canada bridge
item.description: The White House has reiterated its demands even after a 'positive' call between Trump and Mark Carney.
